title: Frontend Architecture & Design Systems
frameworks: Swiss/Bauhaus Design Spec: grid-based, typographic hierarchy, whitespace as structure
Design System Tokens: colors, spacing, typography, breakpoints as variables
Dual-Lens Audit: Swiss aesthetic lens + Krug usability lens applied to every page
Krug IA Audit: clear hierarchy, obvious navigation, minimal clicks to content
Layered Frontend: presentation → component → state → API layer
concepts: Design tokens are the single source of truth for visual consistency
Swiss design uses grid systems and typography as primary design tools
Krug's principle: 'Don't make me think' — obvious beats clever
Dual-lens audit catches both aesthetic and usability problems
Page surface inventory catalogs every element for audit
Progressive enhancement: core content works without JavaScript
Accessibility is not an afterthought — it's a design constraint
Component-driven development: build atoms, compose molecules, assemble pages
context: Extracted from ordostudio — production frontend architecture using Swiss/Bauhaus design principles with design system tokens, a layered component architecture (presentation → state → API), and dual-lens quality audits combining Josef Muller-Brockmann aesthetic standards with Steve Krug usability heuristics.
